sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AnaptysBio (NASDAQ:ANAB) CFO Dennis Mulroy Sells 10,000 Shares
feed.summary: AnaptysBio CFO Dennis Mulroy sold 10,000 shares of ANAB stock for $500,000 on December 22, and an additional 15,725 shares on December 16, significantly reducing his stake. Despite Mulroy's sales, AnaptysBio beat earnings expectations, authorized a $100 million share buyback, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $55.40. The company's stock shows strong year-to-date performance but remains unprofitable.

feed.title: 1 Analyst Thinks Micron Stock Can Touch $500. Should You Buy It Here?
feed.summary: An analyst at Rosenblatt Securities suggests Micron Technology (MU) stock could reach $500, citing strong Q1 fiscal 2026 results and accelerating AI-driven demand for memory chips. Micron reported exceptional revenue and EPS growth, with its High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) poised for significant future expansion. Despite its low forward earnings multiple due to market cyclicality, analysts are overwhelmingly bullish on MU stock as it enters a potentially highly profitable period.

feed.title: Travere Therapeutics stock gains as FDA messaging on proteinuria endpoint boosts Filspari approval hopes
feed.summary: Travere Therapeutics (NASDAQ:TVTX) stock gained after positive commentary from Cantor Fitzgerald regarding the potential approval of its kidney disease drug Filspari. The U.S. FDA's consistent messaging on proteinuria reduction as an approvable endpoint for FSGS has boosted approval hopes ahead of Filspari's PDUFA date. This follows strong Q3 2025 financial results and positive efficacy data presented at American Society of Nephrology Kidney Week 2025.

feed.title: article title here
feed.summary: brief 2-3 sentence summary of the article

feed.title: When Will Small And Mid-Sized Businesses In Construction Truly Adopt AI? Tech Company Trimble Urges Patience.
feed.summary: Trimble, a technology company providing software and hardware for the construction industry, emphasizes the crucial role of data connection and workflow integration in AI adoption, particularly for small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs). While generative AI chatbots are gaining traction, Trimble believes SMBs will gradually integrate AI into back-office systems, driven by larger tech-enabled companies and a younger, tech-savvy workforce. However, Trimble cautions that patience is key as SMBs require reliable, high-value AI solutions with deterministic accuracy before widespread adoption.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock Today: Shares Hover Near 52-Week High as 2026 Earnings, M&A Momentum, and Analyst Targets Collide
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) is trading near its 52-week high, capping a strong 2025 driven by a rebound in investment banking, robust trading conditions, and a supportive market backdrop. The company is strategically expanding in Japan and re-aligning its investment banking divisions for AI and digital infrastructure deals, reinforcing its position as a proxy for the global deals-and-capital-markets cycle. Despite the strong performance, analyst targets generally suggest a "Hold" stance, indicating that much of the optimism is already priced into the stock ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings release on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: PepsiCo Stock News Today (Dec. 24, 2025): PEP Trades Near $144 in a Shortened Session as Analysts Weigh 2026 Turnaround Plan, Dividend Strength, and Legal Risks
feed.summary: PepsiCo shares traded near $144 in a shortened Christmas Eve session as analysts assessed the company's 2026 turnaround plan, dividend strength, and emerging legal risks. The company's 2026 plan focuses on modest organic revenue growth, deeper cost cuts, and simplifying its product portfolio, aiming for core operating margin expansion. Key challenges include legal scrutiny over pricing practices and the execution risk in its North America snacks and beverages divisions where market share and volumes are under pressure. Despite these concerns, analysts still project approximately 10% upside for the stock, underpinned by its strong dividend profile.

feed.title: Electronic Arts stock hits all-time high at $204.64 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Electronic Arts (EA) stock has hit an all-time high of $204.64 USD, driven by strong investor confidence and a 40.29% year-to-date increase. Despite its premium valuation and recent Q1 2025 earnings falling short of expectations, analysts highlight investor optimism for EA's growth potential fueled by strategic initiatives. The company is actively buying back shares and plans a 2026 Formula One World Championship expansion, demonstrating its resilience in the evolving gaming industry.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Sees Unusually High Options Volume (NASDAQ:FANG)
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) experienced unusually high options trading volume, with traders acquiring 5,205 put options, a 48% increase from typical daily volume, indicating potential bearish sentiment. This comes as a director recently sold a significant number of shares and the company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and paid a dividend. Analysts currently have a consensus "Buy" rating on the stock with an average price target of $188.76.

feed.title: Investors Buy Large Volume of Regions Financial Call Options (NYSE:RF)
feed.summary: Investors have shown unusual bullish options activity in Regions Financial (NYSE:RF), purchasing 3,512 call options, a 68% increase over the average daily volume. The company recently approved a $3.0 billion stock buyback and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.265 per share, yielding approximately 3.8%. Analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on the stock with a consensus target price of $28.21.

feed.title: Schwab Hits 52-Week High: Is This the Right Time to Buy SCHW for 2026?
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) recently hit a 52-week high of $102.05, driven by solid GDP numbers and strong client asset growth influenced by strategic acquisitions. The company's efforts in advisory solutions, combined with relatively higher interest rates aiding net interest margin and a consistent dividend hike, position it for continued revenue expansion. However, rising operating expenses due to investments in long-term growth and regulatory costs make it a cautious bet for now, although long-term holders may find continued gains.

feed.title: Richmond firefighters respond to fire at Public Storage facility
feed.summary: Richmond firefighters responded to a three-alarm fire at a Public Storage facility located at 398 Carlson Blvd. Video from the scene showed flames bursting from the roof and smoke emanating from the building. Several storage units were impacted and the building suffered a partial roof collapse, with the cause of the fire currently under investigation.

feed.title: HALPER SADEH LLC ENCOURAGES EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES CORPORATION SHAREHOLDERS TO CONTACT THE FIRM TO DISCUSS THEIR RIGHTS
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether officers and directors of Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE: EW) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm encourages current long-term shareholders to contact them to discuss potential legal rights and options, including seeking corporate governance reforms or the return of funds to the company. Shareholder involvement is highlighted as crucial for improving company policies and enhancing shareholder value.

feed.title: HALPER SADEH LLC ENCOURAGES EQUINIX, INC. SHAREHOLDERS TO CONTACT THE FIRM TO DISCUSS THEIR RIGHTS
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether officers and directors of Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ: EQIX) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm encourages current long-term shareholders of Equinix to contact them to discuss potential legal rights, including corporate governance reforms, the return of funds to the company, or other relief. Shareholder involvement is emphasized as a way to improve company policies and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Stock News Today: Agentforce Momentum, AI Reliability Questions, and Updated Wall Street Forecasts (Dec. 24, 2025)
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) is navigating investor narratives concerning the growth of its Agentforce and Data 360 products against growing industry questions about the reliability of large language models for business operations. Despite ending 2025 down roughly 21% year-to-date, Salesforce is attempting to demonstrate a combination of revenue growth and margin expansion, underpinned by strategic acquisitions like Informatica and Qualified. The company faces a "proof year" in 2026 for its Agentforce monetization model, with stock performance likely to follow its ability to deliver reliable enterprise AI solutions.

feed.title: Richmond firefighters battle blaze at Public Storage facility on Carlson Boulevard
feed.summary: Richmond firefighters responded to a three-alarm blaze at a Public Storage facility on Carlson Boulevard, which caused multiple roof collapses and heavy smoke. The fire required assistance from neighboring fire departments, and one firefighter sustained minor injuries. Crews are still working to extinguish deep-seated fires under collapsed sections of the roof.

feed.title: eBay Celebrates "Top Sellers" Of 2025 With Self-Congratulatory Awards Touting Ads, Authentication & More
feed.summary: eBay recently held its "Exporter Of the Year 2025" awards, celebrating "Top Sellers of 2025," though the article suggests the event focused more on eBay's tools and programs than the sellers' individual achievements. The awards highlighted how sellers supposedly leveraged eBay's resources like research tools, authenticity programs, and advertising for their success, with the article critically examining these claims in light of persistent platform issues and recent policy changes. The author questions the self-congratulatory tone and eBay's portrayal of its role in seller success, especially concerning the effectiveness and cost of its various offerings.

feed.title: Travere Therapeutics Inducement Grants: Market Anticipations
feed.summary: Travere Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: TVTX) has seen its stock rise by 16.33% following news of promising trial results and a strategic decision to offer Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to five new hires. These RSUs, vesting over four years, aim to attract and retain talent, aligning employee interests with company performance to boost productivity and loyalty. Despite challenging financials marked by high debt and negative profitability margins, the company's move reflects a proactive HR strategy to secure growth and operational efficiency in a competitive market.

feed.title: Air Industries Group Faces Volatile Market Amid Financial Challenges and New Developments
feed.summary: Air Industries Group (AIRI) is navigating a volatile market, with its stock tumbling -7.16% due to investor sentiment concerns following key manufacturing updates. Despite reporting a modest revenue and positive gross margin, the company faces cost pressures and a negative EBIT Margin. Strategic decisions regarding debt management and capital expenditures are crucial for its future trajectory and investor confidence.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley stock hits all-time high at 181.98 USD
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's stock reached an all-time high of $181.98, marking a 92.9% increase from its 52-week low and a 45.23% total return over the past year. This performance reflects strong investor confidence, a healthy PEG ratio of 0.38, and a "GOOD" financial health rating by InvestingPro, alongside strategic initiatives like property acquisitions and exploring risk transfers for AI-related loans.

feed.title: Travere Therapeutics (TVTX) Shares Surge Over 16%
feed.summary: Travere Therapeutics (TVTX) saw its shares surge over 16%, driven by positive market sentiment despite financial metrics indicating potential risks like negative margins and insider selling. The biopharmaceutical company, focused on rare kidney, liver, and metabolic diseases, has a robust gross margin but a high debt-to-equity ratio and a low Altman Z-Score signal distress. Valuation metrics suggest a speculative growth profile with high institutional ownership.

feed.title: Travere Therapeutics (TVTX) Stock Jumps on Dec. 24, 2025: 52-Week High, FDA Catalyst Ahead, and Analyst Price Targets
feed.summary: Travere Therapeutics (TVTX) saw its stock jump on December 24, 2025, reaching a 52-week high, driven by strong commercial execution for FILSPARI and anticipation of an FDA decision regarding its use in FSGS. The FDA's target action date for FILSPARI in focal segmental glomerulosclerosis is January 13, 2026, which could expand the drug's indications. Analysts are closely watching this catalyst, as current price targets are now near the stock's trading price after the recent surge.

feed.title: Charles Schwab to Match Federal Contributions to Employees’ Children’s Trump Accounts
feed.summary: Charles Schwab announced it will match the federal government's $1,000 contribution to Trump Accounts for its U.S. employees' children, aiming to help families build long-term financial security. The federal pilot program provides a one-time $1,000 payment from the U.S. Treasury to tax-advantaged savings accounts for children born between 2025 and 2028. Many details regarding the accounts, such as specific tax advantages and administering providers, are still unconfirmed.

feed.title: Ares Management Eyes Buyout to Strengthen Private Equity Business
feed.summary: Ares Management Corp. is considering a significant acquisition to bolster its private equity division, aiming to better compete with industry giants like Blackstone and KKR. CEO Michael Arougheti stated that the company has ample financial capacity for such a move, especially as U.S. retirement plans increasingly access private markets. While no specific targets were named, Ares is open to acquiring a firm managing $100 billion or more to achieve greater scale and diversification in its private equity business, which currently accounts for a small portion of its total assets under management.

feed.title: Dominion Energy sues Trump administration after halting 5 wind projects
feed.summary: Dominion Energy has filed a federal lawsuit against the Trump administration after leases for five large-scale offshore wind projects along the East Coast were suspended. The lawsuit was filed on Tuesday, following a decision that halted projects already under construction. This legal action highlights the ongoing tension between energy companies and the government regarding renewable energy development.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock Today: Analyst Upgrades, Tariff Pressures, and a CEO Change Set the Tone for 2026
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) is facing a dynamic environment as it heads into 2026, marked by a significant CEO transition, ongoing tariff pressures, and a mixed analyst outlook. The company is navigating consumer demand shifts and competitive pricing while seeking to maintain its defensive bellwether status and commitment to shareholder returns. Investors are closely monitoring its January 2026 earnings webcast for insights into strategic priorities and market stability.

feed.title: Home Depot Stock (HD) News Today, Dec. 24, 2025: Price Action, Analyst Forecasts, and What Investors Are Watching
feed.summary: Home Depot (HD) stock is trading modestly higher on a shortened Christmas Eve session, with shares around $347.51. The stock faces mixed signals from upbeat analyst ratings, cautious earnings revisions, and significant institutional activity. Investors are also monitoring a new "fraud investigation" announcement and substantial put option activity, signaling hedging rather than panic.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide To Rally More Than 10%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
feed.summary: This article presents a summary of recent analyst ratings for ten different companies, including C.H. Robinson Worldwide, CECO Environmental, and Americold Realty Trust. Analysts have adjusted price targets and ratings based on their outlook for these companies, with some seeing potential for significant rallies while others face downgrades. The article provides specific details on price target changes and maintained ratings for each company.

feed.title: WhiteFiber (NASDAQ:WYFI) Trading Down 4% Following Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: WhiteFiber (NASDAQ:WYFI) shares dropped 4% after B. Riley lowered its price target, although the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy." The company faced mixed fundamentals, missing Q3 EPS and revenue estimates, but saw significant year-over-year revenue growth. Analysts highlight a 10-year Nscale colocation deal and unusual call-option buying as potential positive catalysts for the stock.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial stock hits all-time high at 86.24 USD
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial stock has reached a new all-time high of $86.24, reflecting a significant 30.73% increase over the past year and a 112% surge from its 52-week low. The company's robust performance, attractive P/E ratio of 9.46, and aggressive share buybacks, along with dividend growth, signal strong investor confidence. Recent developments include new partnerships and renewed agreements, despite some analyst concerns regarding exposure to lower-end consumers.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges F5, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) and its officers, alleging violations of federal securities laws. The lawsuit claims F5 made misleading statements and concealed a significant security breach affecting key product offerings, leading to artificially inflated stock prices for investors. Shareholders who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of February 17, 2026.

feed.title: Amgen Strikes Drug Pricing Deal With Trump: What Investors Should Know
feed.summary: Amgen has reached a significant agreement with the Trump administration to lower drug prices in the U.S., aligning prices with other developed countries and offering substantial discounts to American consumers. This deal, which also includes an exemption from import tariffs on pharmaceutical ingredients for participating companies expanding domestic manufacturing, addresses key concerns around drug pricing and tariffs. Several other large pharmaceutical companies have made similar agreements, signaling a more cooperative environment between the government and the pharma sector.

feed.title: Aflac's CEO on the History Behind the Duck Commercials
feed.summary: Aflac's CEO, Dan Amos, discussed the origin and impact of the company's famous duck commercials with Barron's editor at large Andy Serwer. The article highlights this discussion, providing insight into the iconic advertising campaign.

feed.title: The Boulder Group closes sale of Dollar General in Hamilton
feed.summary: The Boulder Group has successfully completed the sale of a single-tenant Dollar General property in Hamilton, Ohio, for $2,428,000. This Dollar General Market location features an expanded prototype with a wide range of grocery offerings, strategically located in a high-traffic area with limited competition. The property also benefits from a long-term lease with an investment-grade rated company.

feed.title: Brown & Brown sues Howden in Massachusetts over employee raid
feed.summary: Brown & Brown has filed a civil lawsuit against Howden in Massachusetts state court, alleging trade secret theft, breach of contract, and breach of fiduciary duty. The broker is seeking an injunction, arguing it lost customers to Howden over the weekend due to an employee raid.

feed.title: Citigroup Stock News (NYSE: C) on Dec. 24, 2025: Regulatory Relief, Banamex Progress, and Wall Street Forecasts for 2026
feed.summary: Citigroup (NYSE: C) is ending 2025 with significant momentum due to regulatory relief, strategic streamlining efforts including the Banamex divestment, and improving analyst sentiment. Key developments include the OCC terminating a 2024 amendment to a consent order and the Fed closing notices related to trading risk management. Wall Street is increasingly constructive on Citi's outlook for 2026, driven by tangible progress in its multi-year transformation.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial stock hits all-time high at 86.24 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) stock recently hit an all-time high of $86.24, marking a 30.73% increase over the past year and a 112% surge from its 52-week low. This performance is supported by a "GREAT" overall financial health score, aggressive share buybacks, and 20% dividend growth. The company also continues to expand strategic partnerships, including renewals with Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US LLC and a new credit card program with The Toro Company.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Stock (XOM) News and Forecast for Dec. 24, 2025: Sakhalin-1 Deadline Extended, Oil Prices Rebound, and Analysts See More Upside
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) stock saw trading around $119.62 on December 24, 2025, influenced by the extension of Russia's deadline for selling its Sakhalin-1 stake, a late-December rebound in crude prices, and analyst targets mostly in the low $130s. The article details XOM's current trading position, the significance of the Sakhalin-1 deadline extension for investors, and the impact of rising oil prices amidst a generally down year for crude. It also covers Exxon's fundamentals, long-term strategic plans, analyst forecasts, and various bull and bear case scenarios.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace stock hits all-time high at 211.97 USD
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) has reached an all-time high of $211.97, marking an 88.54% increase over the past year. This surge is supported by a "GREAT" financial health rating and recent strategic moves, including the acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing and a successful notes offering for refinancing. Analysts have also raised their price targets for the stock, citing strong performance.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Invesco, Johnson & Johnson, NiSource, Bunge Global and Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: This Zacks Analyst Blog identifies five high-yield S&P 500 stocks—Invesco Ltd. (IVZ), Johnson & Johnson (JNJ), NiSource (NI), Bunge Global SA (BG), and Morgan Stanley (MS)—for reliable returns in 2026. The article discusses why dividend investing is a strong strategy given the projected moderate economic growth and stabilizing interest rates, emphasizing strong fundamentals and sustainable payout histories. Each company highlighted boasts a strong Zacks Rank, attractive dividend yield, and consistent dividend growth.

feed.title: Anfield raising up to $14 million for U.S. uranium projects
feed.summary: Anfield Energy Inc. is looking to raise up to $14 million through a non-brokered private placement offering, with Uranium Energy Corp. intending to subscribe to a significant portion of the offering. The funds will be used to advance Anfield's uranium and vanadium projects in the U.S., including capital commitments to West Slope, Velvet Wood, Slick Rock projects, and the Shootaring Canyon Mill. This financing aims to support the company's growth and potential listing on a senior U.S. stock exchange.

feed.title: LRN INVESTOR NOTICE: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP Announces that Stride, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Investor Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Stride, Inc. (NYSE: LRN) for purchasers or acquirers of its securities between October 22, 2024, and October 28, 2025. Investors who suffered substantial losses have until January 12, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that Stride made false and misleading statements, including inflating enrollment numbers with "ghost students," cutting staffing costs by overassigning teachers, ignoring compliance requirements, suppressing whistleblowers, and losing enrollments, leading to significant drops in stock price.

feed.title: AerCap and Thai Airways Lead the Way in Sustainable Aviation with New Airbus A321neo Delivery
feed.summary: AerCap has delivered the first of ten Airbus A321neo aircraft to Thai Airways, marking a significant step in the airline's fleet modernization and sustainability efforts. The A321neo aircraft features advanced energy-efficient technologies that will reduce fuel consumption and carbon emissions by up to 20%. This delivery strengthens the long-standing partnership between AerCap and Thai Airways, contributing to a greener future for global aviation.

feed.title: December 2025 Rebalance: WisdomTree U.S. Quality Growth Index
feed.summary: The WisdomTree U.S. Quality Growth Index (WTQGRW) has cumulatively outperformed the Nasdaq 100 since its launch through November 2025, driven by its fundamentals-based stock selection. This approach, which focuses on high-growth companies like Eli Lilly and excludes slower-growth giants, results in a median forward three-year earnings growth estimate significantly higher than the Nasdaq 100. By systematically rebalancing based on quality and growth metrics, WTQGRW aims to provide concentrated exposure to companies poised for long-term outperformance.

feed.title: Here's what stores are open, and which ones are closed, on Christmas
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive list of major retailers and grocery stores that will be open or closed on Christmas Day. It advises readers to check local hours online or call ahead, as operating times can vary by location. The list includes giants like Walmart, Target, Costco, CVS, Walgreens, Starbucks, McDonald's, Kroger, and Albertsons, along with many others.
